2019 Glenbrooks LD Finals Santa Monica RE (Aff) vs West Des Moines Valley AJ (Neg)

This is an elimination debate (round of 2) from the 2019 Glenbrooks Tournament between Rex Evans and Animesh Joshi.  

The topic for this debate was resolved: The United States ought to eliminate subsidies for fossil fuels. 

The debate is a util affirmative vs an NC and some util off positions. 

You can view the documents from this debate at the following links: 
Aff: https://hsld.debatecoaches.org/download/Santa%20Monica/Evans%20Aff/Santa%20Monica-Evans-Aff-Glenbrooks-Finals.docx
Neg: https://hsld.debatecoaches.org/Valley/Joshi%20Neg

The decision was a 2-1 for the affirmative Rex Evans.
